case_title: ROSARIO MELBA DEL DBA ASIAN JANITORIAL SERVICES VS KULKA LEO DE GAR DBA COLLEGE FOR RECORDING ARTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $579.00 FILED BY ROSARIO MELBA DEL DBA ASIAN JANITORIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT KULKA LEO DE GAR DBA COLLEGE FOR RECORDING ARTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KULKA LEO DE GAR DBA COLLEGE FOR RECORDING ARTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSARIO MELBA DEL DBA ASIAN JANITORIAL SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KULKA LEO DE GAR DBA COLLEGE FOR RECORDING ARTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
